scenario.guerra-fredda.name: Cold War
scenario.guerra-fredda.description: An alternate 1960. Two superpowers, a Western bloc, an Eastern bloc, and a non-aligned movement decolonising the world. Thirty nations, a space race, an arms race, and a web of proxy wars. Pick a middle power and try to rewrite the century. A fictionalised historical scenario: nations are real, but characters, events, and choices do not represent real people, political positions, or faithful historical accounts.
country.gf-usa.name: United States
country.gf-canada.name: Canada
country.gf-uk.name: United Kingdom
country.gf-france.name: France
country.gf-west-germany.name: West Germany
country.gf-italy.name: Italy
country.gf-spain.name: Spain
country.gf-ussr.name: Soviet Union
country.gf-east-germany.name: East Germany
country.gf-poland.name: Poland
country.gf-hungary.name: Hungary
country.gf-czechoslovakia.name: Czechoslovakia
country.gf-romania.name: Romania
country.gf-india.name: India
country.gf-yugoslavia.name: Yugoslavia
country.gf-egypt.name: Egypt
country.gf-algeria.name: Algeria
country.gf-indonesia.name: Indonesia
country.gf-cuba.name: Cuba
country.gf-north-vietnam.name: North Vietnam
country.gf-angola.name: Angola
country.gf-mozambique.name: Mozambique
country.gf-nicaragua.name: Nicaragua
country.gf-iran.name: Iran
country.gf-south-africa.name: South Africa
country.gf-ethiopia.name: Ethiopia
country.gf-japan.name: Japan
country.gf-south-korea.name: South Korea
country.gf-taiwan.name: Taiwan
country.gf-hong-kong.name: Hong Kong
tech.gf.civil.mass_production.name: Mass production
tech.gf.civil.mass_production.descriptio: Standardised assembly lines slash unit costs and multiply industrial productivity.
tech.gf.civil.automobiles.name: Automotive industry
tech.gf.civil.automobiles.description: The car becomes mass market. Road networks, supply chains, and private mobility reshape the country's geography.
tech.gf.civil.television.name: Television
tech.gf.civil.television.description: The screen enters every home and rewires public opinion and political consensus.
tech.gf.civil.color_tv.name: Colour television
tech.gf.civil.color_tv.description: Colour broadcasts and new advertising formats lift consumption, entertainment, and national image.
tech.gf.civil.computer_mainframe.name: Mainframe computers
tech.gf.civil.computer_mainframe.descrip: Large computers arrive in universities and ministries: the science engine accelerates.
tech.gf.civil.supersonic_transport.name: Supersonic transport
tech.gf.civil.supersonic_transport.descr: Airliners cross the sound barrier, compressing distances and trade routes — and restoring prestige.
tech.gf.civil.microprocessor.name: Microprocessor
tech.gf.civil.microprocessor.description: Computing miniaturises: a breakthrough that opens the door to consumer electronics and pervasive computing.
tech.gf.civil.petrochemicals.name: Petrochemicals
tech.gf.civil.petrochemicals.description: Plastics, fertilisers, and synthetic materials explode entire new industrial sectors.
tech.gf.civil.green_revolution.name: Green revolution
tech.gf.civil.green_revolution.descripti: Selected seeds, fertilisers, and mechanisation multiply agricultural yields and contain hunger.
tech.gf.civil.welfare_state.name: Modern welfare state
tech.gf.civil.welfare_state.description: Public health, pensions, and mass education: domestic consensus rises and lower-income groups stabilise.
tech.gf.civil.personal_computer.name: Personal computer
tech.gf.civil.personal_computer.descript: The first personal machines reach offices and homes: the tech sector changes scale.
tech.gf.military.jet_fighters.name: Jet fighters
tech.gf.military.jet_fighters.descriptio: Aviation moves to jet propulsion: speed, range, and air-combat doctrine change radically.
tech.gf.military.aircraft_carriers.name: Modern aircraft carriers
tech.gf.military.aircraft_carriers.descr: Carrier-centred naval groups project air power thousands of kilometres from the coast.
tech.gf.military.nuclear_arsenal.name: Nuclear arsenal
tech.gf.military.nuclear_arsenal.descrip: The first atomic warheads enter service: deterrence doctrine permanently changes the strategic calculus.
tech.gf.military.thermonuclear.name: Thermonuclear weapons
tech.gf.military.thermonuclear.descripti: Fusion warheads multiply destructive power: deterrence becomes inescapable.
tech.gf.military.icbm.name: Intercontinental ballistic missiles
tech.gf.military.icbm.description: Long-range vehicles can put any point on the planet under fire in less than an hour.
tech.gf.military.nuclear_submarine.name: Nuclear-powered submarines
tech.gf.military.nuclear_submarine.descr: Atomic-propulsion submarines stay submerged for months: the second leg of deterrence is born.
tech.gf.military.anti_ballistic.name: Anti-ballistic defence
tech.gf.military.anti_ballistic.descript: Missile interception systems start chipping away at the assumption of mutually assured destruction.
tech.gf.military.armored_corps.name: Modern armoured corps
tech.gf.military.armored_corps.descripti: A new generation of tanks and infantry fighting vehicles strengthens land forces.
tech.gf.military.stealth_bomber.name: Stealth bomber
tech.gf.military.stealth_bomber.descript: Low-observable aircraft penetrate enemy radar networks: air doctrine changes paradigm.
tech.gf.military.special_forces.name: Special forces
tech.gf.military.special_forces.descript: Elite units trained for clandestine missions and targeted action behind enemy lines.
tech.gf.intel.codebreaking.name: Cryptanalysis
tech.gf.intel.codebreaking.description: Machines and analysts decipher enemy communications: the information war shifts to mathematics labs.
tech.gf.intel.u2_recon.name: High-altitude reconnaissance
tech.gf.intel.u2_recon.description: High-altitude spy planes photograph enemy territory above the reach of anti-aircraft systems.
tech.gf.intel.satellite_recon.name: Satellite reconnaissance
tech.gf.intel.satellite_recon.descriptio: The first spy satellites return high-resolution imagery of the planet from low orbit.
tech.gf.intel.sleeper_networks.name: Sleeper agent networks
tech.gf.intel.sleeper_networks.descripti: Assets embedded deep inside rival countries, activatable on demand: covert destabilisation unlocks.
tech.gf.intel.false_flag.name: False-flag operations
tech.gf.intel.false_flag.description: Clandestine actions attributed to other actors: targeted sabotage with no direct fingerprints unlocks.
tech.gf.intel.counter_subversion.name: Counter-subversion
tech.gf.intel.counter_subversion.descrip: Internal-security programmes detect and neutralise foreign cells and influence networks.
tech.gf.intel.computer_espionage.name: Computer espionage
tech.gf.intel.computer_espionage.descrip: The first intrusions into enemy computing systems open a brand-new clandestine front.
tech.gf.intel.diplomatic_pouch.name: Covert diplomatic networks
tech.gf.intel.diplomatic_pouch.descripti: Cover personnel inside embassies multiply the foreign intelligence collection capacity.
tech.gf.space.sputnik.name: Artificial satellite
tech.gf.space.sputnik.description: The first man-made object to orbit the Earth. A global scientific prestige coup.
tech.gf.space.manned_orbital.name: Manned orbital flight
tech.gf.space.manned_orbital.description: The first human orbits the planet: the space programme is changed forever.
tech.gf.space.lunar_flyby.name: Lunar flyby
tech.gf.space.lunar_flyby.description: Manned probes fly past the Moon without landing: translunar trajectories and re-entry are tested.
tech.gf.space.apollo.name: Manned Moon landing
tech.gf.space.apollo.description: Astronauts walk on the lunar surface. The television moment that defines the century.
tech.gf.space.station.name: Orbital space station
tech.gf.space.station.description: A permanent orbital platform hosts long-duration experiments and crew rotations.
tech.gf.space.mars_probe.name: Mars probes
tech.gf.space.mars_probe.description: Robotic vehicles land on Martian soil and start mapping the other habitable planet of the system.
tech.gf.space.shuttle.name: Reusable shuttle
tech.gf.space.shuttle.description: A reusable orbital vehicle lowers per-mission cost and multiplies access to space.
tech.gf.space.manned_mars.name: Manned Mars mission
tech.gf.space.manned_mars.description: The first human mission to the Red Planet. The scientific frontier of the century, beyond the Moon.
event.gf.crisis.caribbean_standoff.name: Caribbean standoff
event.gf.crisis.caribbean_standoff.descr: Foreign missile launchers are discovered on an island near a major continent. The crisis is global; the hours are counted.
event.gf.crisis.caribbean_standoff.choic: Show muscle with imposing naval readiness
Open a back channel for a reciprocal swap
event.gf.crisis.berlin_tension.name: Tension over Berlin
event.gf.crisis.berlin_tension.descripti: A city split between two blocs again becomes the symbol of the confrontation. Checkpoints, ultimatums, inspections: every gesture is watched.
event.gf.crisis.berlin_tension.choice.fi: Firm line in support of the western side
event.gf.space.sputnik_launch.name: A new satellite in orbit
event.gf.space.sputnik_launch.descriptio: A rival power announces the successful launch of a new satellite. The political pressure to respond is enormous.
event.gf.space.apollo_milestone.name: Space programme milestone
event.gf.space.apollo_milestone.descript: The space agency celebrates a symbolic milestone. Television coverage is everywhere and the public is buzzing.
event.gf.space.apollo_milestone.choice.c: Channel resources into a classified military project
event.gf.decolonization.name: Wave of decolonisation
event.gf.decolonization.description: A new country in the Global South gains independence. Former colonial powers and the blocs both court its friendship.
event.gf.decolonization.choice.support_i: Recognise and support the new independent governments
event.gf.decolonization.choice.stay_sile: Stay neutral so as not to irritate the former colonial powers
event.gf.proxy_war.korea.name: Tension on the Asian peninsula
event.gf.proxy_war.korea.description: A divided peninsula heats up again. The powers involved request military and political support.
event.gf.proxy_war.korea.choice.stay_cle: Stay at arm's length and offer mediation
event.gf.proxy_war.southeast_asia.name: Conflict in South-East Asia
event.gf.proxy_war.southeast_asia.descri: A regional conflict in a faraway jungle drags on for years. A superpower asks for logistical support.
event.gf.proxy_war.southeast_asia.choice: Back the intervention with resources and advisors
Push for a multilateral negotiated settlement
event.gf.proxy_war.angola.name: Civil war in southern Africa
event.gf.proxy_war.angola.description: A civil war in an African country pits factions backed by different blocs against each other. A position is required.
event.gf.proxy_war.angola.choice.fund_fa: Fund the faction aligned with your line
event.gf.proxy_war.angola.choice.diploma: Propose a negotiation table under non-aligned auspices
event.gf.diplomacy.salt_summit.name: Arms-control summit
event.gf.diplomacy.salt_summit.descripti: The superpowers convene a summit to limit strategic arsenals. Joining has political costs and benefits.
event.gf.diplomacy.salt_summit.choice.re: Refuse: do not sign papers that tie our hands
event.gf.diplomacy.non_aligned_summit.de: Non-aligned countries convene a coordination conference. Showing up is itself a strong diplomatic stance.
event.gf.diplomacy.non_aligned_summit.ch: Host the delegation and give a programmatic speech
Skip the summit and focus on bilateral relations
event.gf.diplomacy.detente_thaw.name: Sudden thaw
event.gf.diplomacy.detente_thaw.descript: After months of tension, both superpowers signal openness. A window opens to lower the global temperature.
event.gf.intel.double_agent.name: Double agent uncovered
event.gf.intel.double_agent.description: A senior official of ours has actually been working for a hostile power. The scandal is imminent.
event.gf.intel.double_agent.choice.publi: Public trial — make a political example
event.gf.intel.double_agent.choice.silen: Silent swap for one of our captured agents
event.gf.intel.covert_op_request.name: Covert operation request
event.gf.intel.covert_op_request.descrip: The head of intelligence requests authorisation for a destabilising covert operation in a country adjacent to a rival.
event.gf.economy.oil_shock.name: Oil shock
event.gf.economy.oil_shock.description: A cartel of producer countries cuts exports. Crude prices double in a few months.
event.gf.economy.oil_shock.choice.subsid: Direct subsidies to households and firms
event.gf.economy.oil_shock.choice.market: Let the market absorb the shock
event.gf.economy.postwar_boom.name: Industrial boom
event.gf.economy.postwar_boom.descriptio: The economy is firing: private investment and public spending compound. Now you must decide where to channel the tailwind.
event.gf.economy.postwar_boom.choice.inv: Invest in heavy industry and infrastructure
Invest in domestic consumption and services
event.gf.economy.stagflation.name: Stagflation
event.gf.economy.stagflation.description: High inflation, stagnant growth. The economic picture demands an unpopular choice.
event.gf.economy.stagflation.choice.publ: Major public works to revive demand
event.gf.tech.arms_race.name: Arms race acceleration
event.gf.tech.arms_race.description: A new adversary weapon system forces a choice on the defence budget.
event.gf.tech.computer_revolution.name: Computing revolution
event.gf.tech.computer_revolution.descri: The first commercial computers begin to spread through firms and universities. You see an opportunity.
event.gf.tech.computer_revolution.choice: Subsidies for the national electronics industry
event.gf.politics.succession_crisis.name: Leadership crisis
event.gf.politics.succession_crisis.desc: A change at the top shakes the political picture. Leadership must choose how to stabilise the situation.
event.gf.politics.succession_crisis.choi: Open a season of cautious reform
event.gf.social.student_protests.name: Student protests
event.gf.social.student_protests.descrip: A new generation takes to the streets demanding change. The government must choose its tone.
Open dialogue and accept some demands
event.gf.diplomacy.sino_soviet_rift.name: Friction inside the Eastern bloc
event.gf.diplomacy.sino_soviet_rift.desc: Internal friction inside the Eastern bloc opens a diplomatic opportunity. The question is how to use it.
event.gf.diplomacy.sino_soviet_rift.choi: Exploit the rift to weaken the adversary
Gather intelligence and keep a low profile
event.gf.military.naval_close_call.name: Naval near-miss
event.gf.military.naval_close_call.descr: An adversary cruiser approaches our ships dangerously close in contested international waters.
event.gf.opportunity.olympic_games.name: Olympic games
event.gf.opportunity.olympic_games.descr: The Olympics are approaching. A great showcase for national prestige, but also a politically minefield.
event.gf.opportunity.olympic_games.choic: Send a full delegation: full sporting showcase
Boycott in solidarity with western allies
event.gf.economy.third_world_aid.name: Development aid
event.gf.economy.third_world_aid.descrip: A development-aid programme for the Global South seeks contributions. A diplomatic choice as much as an economic one.
Concentrate resources on the domestic economy
victory.gf.economic.name: Economic victory
victory.gf.economic.description: Become the world's top economy by GDP. That means overtaking the superpowers — a generational feat.
victory.gf.military.name: Military victory
victory.gf.military.description: Exert control over at least eight nations through alliance, vassalage, or direct conquest.
victory.gf.scientific.name: Scientific victory
victory.gf.scientific.description: Complete the first manned mission to Mars: win the century's space race.
victory.gf.diplomatic.name: Diplomatic victory
victory.gf.diplomatic.description: Build an alliance network covering at least 50% of remaining nations.
victory.gf.domination.name: World domination
victory.gf.domination.description: Exert control over at least fifteen nations: the bipolar world is over, and it is yours.
difficulty.easy.name: Easy
difficulty.normal.name: Normal
difficulty.hard.name: Hard
difficulty.iron-man.name: Iron Man
bloc.gf.western.name: Atlantic Bloc
bloc.gf.eastern.name: Eastern Bloc
bloc.gf.non-aligned.name: Non-Aligned Movement
un.gf.peacekeeping.title: Interposition force in the crisis theatre
un.gf.peacekeeping.description: Motion to deploy observers and peacekeeping contingents to the conflict areas and freeze the front lines.
un.gf.condemnation.tactical.title: Condemnation of tactical nuclear use
un.gf.condemnation.tactical.description: Emergency resolution condemning the use of tactical nuclear weapons and calling for an immediate moratorium.
un.gf.condemnation.strategic.title: Condemnation of strategic strike
un.gf.condemnation.strategic.description: Extraordinary Council session to condemn the strategic strike and consider collective countermeasures.
un.gf.humanitarian.title: Humanitarian relief programme
un.gf.humanitarian.description: Coordinated assistance to populations hit by regional conflicts, famine or forced displacement.
un.gf.condemnation.sanctions.title: Motion against unilateral sanctions
un.gf.condemnation.sanctions.description: Debate on the legitimacy of the imposed sanctions regime and its impact on the civilian population.
un.gf.climate.tension.title: International détente pact
un.gf.climate.tension.description: Multilateral framework to lower tension between the blocs and head off a cascading escalation.
un.gf.climate.periodic.title: Convention on the common environment
un.gf.climate.periodic.description: Periodic treaty coordinating environmental stewardship above the bloc divide.
